name: Janelise
message: From Philadelphia I seen your BF post about you and what your doing is incredible💕can’t wait to keep up with your journey and wish you safe travels ✨

name: Alicia
message: You doing your best and listen to your intuition at all times.

name: Ariana
message: Just came from your bf POV. Remember god never gives you more then you can handle. You’re making memories that will last a lifetime. This journey will not just benefit you but your relationship. If you can’t do this there won’t be anything that can stand in your way. Sending much love ❤️

name: Morgan
message: Tent setup looks great, seems like all that practice in the living room paid off!
